Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-30-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carlito Mandia.
Marvin J. Christiansen and Mark A. Christiansen, Esq. for Plaintiff: Farmers Insurance Exchange.
After hearing the evidence presented, matter is taken uder submission, proposed judgment received in court.

April 30, 2004
Judgment granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan.
Details of Judgment as follows:
Juggment in favor of Plaintiff: Farmers Insurance Exchange and against Defendant:
Randy Chau $45,810.03 Principal and $304.50 Costs for Total of $46,114.53.
Yanny Chhhith $25,171.83 Principal and $304.50 Costs for Total of $25,476.33.
Yorn Chim $11,805.54 Principal and $309.50 Costs for Total of $12,115.04.
Jonny Peang $6,789.57 Principal and $384.50 Costs for Total of $7,174.07.
Kongphet Joe Chanthavong $20,638.20 Principal and $304.50 Costs for Total of $20,942.70.
Johnny Chounlamany, Francis Daoheuang and Mary Thorn aka Many Thorn $20,638.20 Principal and $464.50 Costs for Total of $21,102.70.
Total $130,853.37 Prinicipal and $2,072.00 Costs for a Grand total of $132,925.37.
